publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-01-06 23:24:34 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: A collection of clippings documenting anything related to gay people.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: A collection of clippings documenting anything related to gay people, mostly from Madison, Wisconsin newspapers for 1978-1979 and mostly from Chicago newspapers for 1980-1991. Plus photographs of gay softball teams and pride parades in Chicago in 1981 and correspondence to public officials and others about gay issues.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Michael H. Nee Clippings Collection, #7785. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Greater Chicago Gay and Lesbian Democrats
Chicago Gay and Lesbian History Project
GATES and NOGLSTP newsletters: societies of gay technicians, engineers and scientists
Illinois Gay and Lesbian Task Force
University of Wisconsin- Milwaukee: Gay Community
Humboldt Society: Lesbian and Gay Naturalist of Philadelphia
Bronx: Lesbian and Gay Independent Democrats
GLAD: Gay and Lesbian Advocates and Defenders, Inc.
"It's Time" and "The Task Force Report"- NGLTF newsletters
Act Up New York, newsletter, donations

National Day of Lesbian and Gay Resistance/Roll Back Reaganism march flyer

Illinois Gay and Lesbian Task Force
Bronx Lesbian and Gay Democrats Correspondence
National Organization of Gay and Lesbian Scientists and Technical Professionals
"Fairie"- Harry Hay speech at Colorado Fairie Circle
"The Gays and the Police"- Chicago Police Department training bulletin
Map of gay life in Chicago
1981 Chicago Directory: A Gay Guide to Businesses and Entertainment
Gaylife: Chicago's Gay and Lesbian Newsweekly

"America Now: Why the Gays Came Out of the Closet"
"Genetic evidence for different male and female roles during cultural transitions in the British Isles"

Various publications, and gay life newspapers
